root.rep_text: พิมพ์ Slip ประจำวัน

doctype.text: กลุ่มรายการ

doc_no.text: เลขที่สลิป

combo.doc_type: select DOC_TYPE as item_code , DOC_NAME as item_desc from sc_acc_m_ucf_doc_type order by DOC_TYPE desc
combo.doc_no_combo: select doc_no as item_code, doc_no || ' ' || description as item_desc from sc_acc_journal_heading_firm where 1=1 and post_to_gl_status = '0' and doc_type = {0}

root.sql:
SELECT sc_acc_m_ucf_doc_type.doc_name as "กลุ่มรายการ", sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.doc_no as "เลขที่เอกสาร", pka_com_function.fp_form( sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.doc_no , 'XXXX-XXXXXX-XXXXXXXXXX' ) as from_doc_no, sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.description as "รายละเอียดใบรายการ", sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.doc_type , to_tdate( sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.journal_date , 'dd mon yyyy' ) as "วันที่รายการ", sc_com_m_branch.branch_id as "สาขา" , sc_com_m_branch.BRANCH_NAME as "ชื่อสาขา" ,
sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.entry_date as "วันเวลาที่ทำรายการ", sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.nature as "ฝั่ง", pka_acc.fp_format_account( sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.account_id ) as "เลขที่บัญชี" , sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.dr_amount as "เดบิต" , sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.cr_amount as "เครดิต",
sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.sequence_no as "ลำดำรายการ" , CASE WHEN sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.dr_amount = 0 THEN ' ' ELSE ' ' END || sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name as "ชื่อบัญชี", sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.remark as "หมายเหตุ", sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.desc_journal_detail as "คำอธิบายรายการ" ,pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai( sum( sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.dr_amount ) over ( PARTITION BY sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.doc_no )) as "ยอดรวมแต่ละใบ( ไทย )" , ( select user_name from si_security_user where user_id = '!user_name_1!' ) as user_name , ( select user_name from si_security_user where user_id = '!checker_1!' ) as checker_name , ( select user_name from si_security_user where user_id = sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.entry_name ) as entry_name FROM sc_acc_journal_detail_firm , sc_acc_journal_heading_firm , sc_acc_m_account_master , sc_acc_m_ucf_doc_type , sc_com_m_branch WHERE 1=1 and ( sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.doc_type = sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.doc_type ) and ( sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.doc_no = sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.doc_no ) and ( sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.journal_date = sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.journal_date ) and ( sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.branch_id = sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.branch_id ) and ( sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.account_id = sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id ) and ( sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.doc_type = sc_acc_m_ucf_doc_type.doc_type ) -- and ( sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.branch_id = sc_com_m_branch.branch_id ) --สาขาลงบัญชี and ( sc_com_m_branch.branch_id = sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.entry_br_id ) --สาขาลงรายการ and (( sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.cancel_status <> '5' ) or ( sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.cancel_status is null )) and ( sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.cancel_status = '0' )
/* and ( ( sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.journal_date = :adtm_date ) and ( sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.branch_id = :as_brid ) and ( sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.doc_no between :as_startdoc and :as_enddoc ) and ( sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.doc_type = :as_bookcode ) */ /*WHERE*/
order by sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.journal_date , sc_com_m_branch.branch_id, sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.doc_type desc , sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.doc_no, sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.sequence_no
